reviews.review_title: App not generating models, gets stuck
reviews.review_description: Hi, I am happy to update the review, later, but right now the app is not working on quest 3, after typing in a word for an object, the timer counts down but then nothing shows up.  The support site in the in description is giving a 404 page not found error.  I am happy to help troubleshoot with the dev to get this to work as it looks really creative and useful, so I want it to work.
